# OpenMYC

> OpenMYC is a free search engine for comedy open mics in New York City, covering all five boroughs: Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, the Bronx, and Staten Island.

OpenMYC helps comedians find open mics by day of the week, borough, time, cost, and venue type. The site is maintained by Kari Burt, a comedian based in NYC.

## Pages

- [Home](https://findopenmyc.com/): Search and filter open mics across NYC
- [Browse Mics](https://findopenmyc.com/mics): Full listing of all open mics with filters for borough, day, time, and cost
- [About](https://findopenmyc.com/about): About OpenMYC, the creator, and data sources
- [Submit a Mic](https://findopenmyc.com/submit): Submit a new open mic to be listed on OpenMYC

## API

- [Mics API](https://findopenmyc.com/api/mics): JSON API for querying open mics with parameters for borough, day, start_time, cost, offset, and limit

## Key Facts

- Covers all 5 NYC boroughs: Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, Staten Island
- Filterable by: day of week, borough, start time, cost (free or paid)
- Includes venue name, address, neighborhood, host info, signup instructions, and schedule
- Community-maintained: comedians can submit new mics via the submit form
- Completely free to use
- Contact: hello@findopenmyc.com
